name: Disk Setup
asm_code:
disk_load:
    push dx
    mov si, 3

disk_retry:
    mov ah, 0x02
    mov al, dh
    mov ch, 0x00
    mov dh, 0x00
    mov cl, 0x02
    mov dl, [0x7e00]
    int 0x13
    
    jnc disk_done

    xor ax, ax
    int 0x13
    dec si
    jnz disk_retry

disk_error:
    mov ah, 0x0e
    mov al, 'E'
    int 0x10
    jmp $

disk_done:
    pop dx
    ret
